title: 2018 NORTH AMERICA RV TRAVEL & SAVINGS GUIDE
description: 2018 NORTH AMERICA RV TRAVEL & SAVINGS GUIDE is a book by NONE. The Texas prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime.
descriptionParagraphs: 2018 NORTH AMERICA RV TRAVEL & SAVINGS GUIDE is a book by NONE. The Texas prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime.

What makes it interesting is the prison-censorship logic: officials treat the book as a practical threat model and collapse the distinction between reading about something and doing it. As a book, it can be read not only for subject matter but for the way form, tone, and circulation make a text feel dangerous, intimate, or politically usable to anxious officials.

It also matters as part of a wider censorship history in Texas. The present page is a dossier starter built from source-tracked ban records; the surviving note currently says: The Texas prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: PGS 971, 972 & 973. More publication history, translations, and close reading can be added later.

overview.englishDescription: 2018 NORTH AMERICA RV TRAVEL & SAVINGS GUIDE is a book by NONE. The Texas prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime.
banningParagraphs: 2018 NORTH AMERICA RV TRAVEL & SAVINGS GUIDE entered censorship debates as a book associated with circulation politics, institutional control, and risk knowledge. In the current dossier, the main state objections cluster around instructional harm and public order.

The earliest event currently captured here is 2018-11-05 in Texas, where Texas corrections agencies and prison mailrooms excluded from prison circulation. The Texas prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: PGS 971, 972 & 973. The Texas prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: PGS 971, 972 & 973 DETAILED MAPS OF TEXAS COULD FACILITATE.

counterReadings.title: 100 Banned Books: Censorship Histories of World Literature
counterReadings.author: Nicholas J. Karolides, Margaret Bald, and Dawn B. Sova
